actions.intent: Take the left-side residue pair first, creating dock pressure while starting route-supporting movement near the puppy.
Clear the upper-left route support to break two puppy-pocket crates and show visible target progress.
Accept one dock-warning beat while clearing the right-side support group for the final route action.
Clear the final right-side group, break the remaining puppy-pocket crates, clear a dock triple, and extract.

notes: Designer-approved intended path for the rebuilt first-rescue board; it demonstrates route progress plus a visible dock-warning beat before extraction.
